🌿

Educational Instruments

🌿

Browser-Based Learning Tools

Lightweight browser-based learning tools — no accounts, no tracking, no backend. Built with Claude's chatbot interface. All released under the MIT License.

📚

AP Guides Hub

Study companion for Advanced Placement courses with searchable terms and priority-focused learning

Launch Repository
🔢

Cyber Math Flashcards

Interactive math operations trainer with customizable difficulty levels and problem types

Launch Repository
🌸

Fraction Sakura

Fraction operations practice with Japanese aesthetic and progressive difficulty scaling

Launch Repository
🦅

Philosophy Timeline

A searchable, filterable timeline with summaries of famous philosophical works

Launch Repository
⌨

Perception Typing

A game of perception, recognition, and typing speed

Launch Repository
🤴

A Guide to Le Morte d'Arthur

Read, search, and browse Sir Thomas Malory's classic work on King Arthur

Launch Repository
🔼

Infix-Postfix Parser

Convert infix to postfix mathematical expressions and see the resolution

Launch Repository
🌱

Factoring Quadratic Expressions

Beta

Practice converting quadratics with various difficulties

Launch Repository
📖

Verb Tense Explorer

Beta

Master English verb conjugations with interactive examples and practice tools
